name.en-US: On the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh

sources.description: Translated by J.B. Morris (Hymn nos. 1-13) and A. Edward Johnston (Hymn nos. 14-19). From Nicene and Post-Nicene Fathers, Second Series, Vol. 13, Edited by Philip Schaff and Henry Wace, Buffalo, NY: Christian Literature Publishing Co 1898. Revised and edited for New Advent by Kevin Knight.

title.en-US: On the Nativity of Christ in the Flesh
